title: Eagle Knight prevents damage application

card.rawText: During battle play this card from your hand. Negate any damage for a creature for the remainder of this turn.

effect.value: During battle play this card from your hand. Negate any damage for a creature for the remainder of this turn.

plan.title: Eagle Knight prevents damage application
plan.summary: Verify Eagle Knight keeps the protected creature from taking damage for the rest of the turn.

notes: Read text first: During battle play this card from your hand. Negate any damage for a creature for the remainder of this turn.

steps: Verify protected creature HP stays unchanged.

expectedAssertions.label: Battle pipeline resolved with Eagle Knight active
